phases.name: Shared flag + loader resolution
actions: Port or share unifiedLedgerFlagKeys + resolve*MainLoaderSource from web src/app/lib
Mobile reads same feature_flags via Supabase — no new flags
Fallback to legacy RPCs when flags OFF or kill switch

phases.name: Print/export/share
actions: Reuse CompanyBrand + report PDF layout from api/reports.ts
CSV/Excel only if web supports for that report

phases.name: Role permissions
actions: Hide balances where web hides (salesman restricted view)

phases.name: Test and release gate
tests: cd erp-mobile-app && npm run test (if present)
cd erp-flutter-app && flutter analyze && flutter test (if approved for Flutter)
phases.release_gate: NO APK build/release without operator approval
phases.rollback: Keep previous APK artifact; document install rollback in release notes

data_source_policy.rule: Mobile must match production web data source after flags
data_source_policy.bs_pl: Use unified main loader RPC path when unified_ledger_loader_balance_sheet / profit_loss ON
data_source_policy.fallback: Legacy getBalanceSheet / getProfitLoss when flags OFF — document in screen footer
